text:
HORN MEMORIAL PARKWAY. (a) The following highways in Hunt County are designated as the John L. Horn Memorial Parkway:

(1) the portion of Farm-to-Market Road 1570 between its intersection with State Highway 34 and State Highway 66; and

(2) Spur 1570 between its intersection with State Highway 66 and U.S. Highway 380.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

(1) design and construct markers indicating the designation as the John L. Horn Memorial Parkway and any other appropriate information; and

(2) erect a marker at each end of the parkway and at appropriate intermediate sites along the parkway.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.152 (Trooper Tom Nipper Memorial Highway) by Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 915 (H.B. 3607 ), Sec. 21.001(96), eff. September 1, 2021.

# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 225. State Highway Names
##### § 225.181 — John L

HORN MEMORIAL PARKWAY. (a) The following highways in Hunt County are designated as the John L. Horn Memorial Parkway:

    (1) the portion of Farm-to-Market Road 1570 between its intersection with State Highway 34 and State Highway 66; and

    (2) Spur 1570 between its intersection with State Highway 66 and U.S. Highway 380.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

    (1) design and construct markers indicating the designation as the John L. Horn Memorial Parkway and any other appropriate information; and

    (2) erect a marker at each end of the parkway and at appropriate intermediate sites along the parkway.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.152 (Trooper Tom Nipper Memorial Highway) by Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 915 (H.B. 3607 ), Sec. 21.001(96), eff. September 1, 2021.

*Added by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 718 (H.B.310), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2019.*
